form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since he finished last in a small field at this track in the G2 Prix Robert Papin July 20 over 1200m, soft track; 5 len behind Green Sense with 58kg at $3.10. On debut third of 11 at Deauville April 8 2025 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Imperial Me Cen with 58kg at $5. Suited here and must follow up.
